title: Editorial
abstract_text: Editorial The papers gathered in this issue offer a timely and nuanced perspective on the evolving landscape of mental health research. Although they address a wide range of clinical and psychosocial phenomena, they are united by a shared commitment to understanding psychological functioning in its full complexity — not as a set of isolated symptoms, but as an experience shaped by the interplay of biology, personality, relationships, and social context.
